mapper.select: SELECT id, subject_id, card_type, front_text, back_text, answer_text, explanation, is_ai_generated, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_card ORDER BY id
SELECT id, subject_id, card_type, front_text, back_text, answer_text, explanation, is_ai_generated, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_card WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, subject_id, card_type, front_text, back_text, answer_text, explanation, is_ai_generated, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_card WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_card (subject_id, card_type, front_text, back_text, answer_text, explanation, is_ai_generated, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{cardType}, #{frontText}, #{backText}, #{answerText}, #{explanation}, #{isAiGenerated}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_card SET subject_id = #{subjectId}, card_type = #{cardType}, front_text = #{frontText}, back_text = #{backText}, answer_text = #{answerText}, explanation = #{explanation}, is_ai_generated = #{isAiGenerated}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
